sourceList.title: Foundation for Medieval Genealogy - ADELA de Ponthieu (-after 18 Oct 1241).
Foundation for Medieval Genealogy - ADELA de Ponthieu, daughter of JEAN [I] Comte de Ponthieu & his third wife Beatrix de Saint-Pol (-after 18 Oct 1241).

zh.lifeSummary: 當Adele Ponthieu於大約1170年出生在法國皮卡迪索姆時，她的父親Jean Ier de Ponthieu30歲，母親Beatrice St Pol17歲。她於1191年與Thomas de Saint-Valéry在法國皮卡迪索姆沙吉瓦萊-素-頌結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於1241年10月18日之後在法國皮卡迪索姆多馬吉-朋提額。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Adele Ponthieu于大约1170年出生在法国皮卡迪索姆时，她的父亲Jean Ier de Ponthieu30岁，母亲Beatrice St Pol17岁。她于1191年与Thomas de Saint-Valéry在法国皮卡迪索姆沙吉瓦萊-素-頌结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。她去世于1241年10月18日之后在法国皮卡迪索姆多馬吉-朋提額。

nameMeanings.name: Ponthieu
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: variant of Ponthieu, a habitational name from Ponthieu, a region (former county) in Picardy, between the rivers Authie and Somme.

nameMeanings.name: Adele
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From French Adèle , an ancient name popular in medieval Europe because of the fame of a 7th-century saint, a daughter of the Frankish king Dagobert II. It is of Germanic origin, from adal ‘noble’ (a short form of a two-element name such as Adelheid; see Adelaide ). It was the name of William the Conqueror's youngest daughter ( c.1062–1137 ), who became the wife of Stephen of Blois. However, it died out in England in the later Middle Ages. It was revived in the 19th century, being the name of a character in Johann Strauss's opera Die Fledermaus. Its popularity was further reinforced in the 1930s as the name of a character in the novels of Dornford Yates .

It is of Germanic origin, from adal ‘noble’ (a short form of a two-element name such as Adelheid; see Adelaide ). It was the name of William the Conqueror's youngest daughter ( c.1062–1137 ), who became the wife of Stephen of Blois. However, it died out in England in the later Middle Ages. en.lifeSummary: When Adele Ponthieu was born about 1170, in Somme, Picardie, France, her father, Jean Ier de Ponthieu, was 30 and her mother, Beatrice St Pol, was 17. She married Thomas de Saint-Valéry in 1191, in Saint-Valéry-sur-Somme, Somme, Picardie, France. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died after 18 October 1241, in Domart-en-Ponthieu, Somme, Picardie, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Adele Ponthieu est née environ 1170, à Somme, Picardie, France, son père, Jean Ier de Ponthieu, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Beatrice St Pol, avait 17 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas de Saint-Valéry en 1191, à Saint-Valéry-sur-Somme, Somme, Picardie, France. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Elle est décédée après 18 octobre 1241, à Domart-en-Ponthieu, Somme, Picardie, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Adele Ponthieu um 1170 in Somme, Picardie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Jean Ier de Ponthieu 30 und ihre Mutter Beatrice St Pol 17. Sie hat 1191 in Saint-Valéry-sur-Somme, Somme, Picardie, Frankreich Thomas de Saint-Valéry geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb nach 18. Oktober 1241 in Domart-en-Ponthieu, Somme, Picardie, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Adele Ponthieu è nata il circa 1170 nel Somme, Picardie, Francia, sua padre, Jean Ier de Ponthieu, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Beatrice St Pol, aveva 17 anni. Lei sposato Thomas de Saint-Valéry nel 1191, nel Saint-Valéry-sur-Somme, Somme, Picardie, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì dopo il 18 ottobre 1241, nel Domart-en-Ponthieu, Somme, Picardie, Francia.

ja.Saint-Valéry-sur-Somme, Somme, Picardie,: フランスピカーディソンメサイント-ヴァルeリ-スル-ソンメ
ja.lifeSummary: Adele Ponthieuが約1170年にフランスピカーディソンメで生まれた時，父Jean Ier de Ponthieuは30歳，母Beatrice St Polは17歳であった。1191年にフランスピカーディソンメサイント-ヴァルeリ-スル-ソンメでThomas de Saint-Valéryと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1241年10月18日以後にフランスピカーディソンメドマルト-エン-プオンスイエウで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Adele Ponthieu(이)가 대략 1170년 프랑스 피카디 솜에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Jean Ier de Ponthieu(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Beatrice St Pol(은)는 17세였다. 그녀는 1191년 프랑스 피카디 솜 세인트-발e리-수-소에서 Thomas de Saint-Valéry(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1241년 10월 18일 이후 프랑스 피카디 솜 도마트--폰스이외에서 사망했다.

mn.aproximadamente 1170–after 18 October 12: ойролцоогоор 1170 он–1241 оны Аравдугаар сарын 18–наас хойш

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Adele Ponthieu nasceu aproximadamente 1170, em Somme, Picardie, França, seu pai, Jean Ier de Ponthieu, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Beatrice St Pol, tinha 17 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas de Saint-Valéry em 1191, em Saint-Valéry-sur-Somme, Somme, Picardie, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ela faleceu após 18 de outubro de 1241, em Domart-en-Ponthieu, Somme, Picardie, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Adele Ponthieu родилась около 1170 г. в местности сомм, пикарди, Франция, её отцу по имени Jean Ier de Ponthieu было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Beatrice St Pol, 17. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas de Saint-Valéry в 1191 г. в местности сеинт-валeри-сур-сомм, сомм, пикарди, Франция. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла после 18 октябрь 1241 г. в местности домерт-ен-понтиеу, сомм, пикарди, Франция.

sm.aproximadamente 1170–after 18 October 12: e tusa o le 1170–ina ua ma'ea le 18 Oketopa 1241

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Adele Ponthieu nació aproximadamente 1170, en Somme, Picardie, Francia, su papá, Jean Ier de Ponthieu, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Beatrice St Pol, tenía 17 años. Se casó con Thomas de Saint-Valéry en 1191, en Saint-Valéry-sur-Somme, Somme, Picardie, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió después de 18 de octubre de 1241, en Domart-en-Ponthieu, Somme, Picardie, Francia.
